title: Chronos recording media helpers
validations: npx.cmd eslint modules/chronos/ChronosPage.tsx modules/chronos/ChronosExternalRoomPage.tsx lib/chronos/recording.ts --max-warnings 0 em apps/hub: PASS com warning conhecido MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON do Node
npm.cmd run check-types:hub: PASS apos extracao dos helpers de gravacao/midia Chronos
npm.cmd run lint:hub: PASS com warning conhecido MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON do Node em apps/hub/eslint.config.js
$env:CIRCLE_NODE_TOTAL='2'; npm.cmd run build --workspace @repo/hub: PASS com warning conhecido Turbopack/NFT sobre trace de engineering-operations-source.ts
smoke HTTP local em servidor ja ativo http://127.0.0.1:3001: /chronos 200, /chronos/lideranca 200, /hermes 200, /hades 200 e /iris 200
smoke HTTP local sem sessao para /api/chronos/meetings, /api/chronos/google-calendar/status e /api/chronos/invitees?q=lu: PASS 401 esperado
rg @ts-nocheck|eslint-disable em apps/hub/lib/chronos/recording.ts, apps/hub/modules/chronos/ChronosPage.tsx e apps/hub/modules/chronos/ChronosExternalRoomPage.tsx: PASS, sem supressoes
git diff --check nos arquivos do recorte: PASS com avisos esperados LF/CRLF
sem endpoint novo, banco, env, secret, token, Vercel, Supabase admin, Preview, homologacao ou producao
rollback: Reverter apps/hub/lib/chronos/recording.ts e reintroduzir os helpers locais de gravacao/midia em apps/hub/modules/chronos/ChronosPage.tsx e apps/hub/modules/chronos/ChronosExternalRoomPage.tsx.
Nao ha DDL, env, deploy, endpoint novo, alias, dominio ou mudanca de integracao real associada.
notes: Extrai stopChronosMediaStream, formatChronosDuration, getSupportedChronosRecordingMimeType, buildChronosRecordingStream e addMissingChronosRecordingAudioTracks para apps/hub/lib/chronos/recording.ts.
Preserva o comportamento de captura, stream local/remoto, audio deduplicado, tela externa e tela interna do Chronos.
O helper de MIME agora evita acesso a MediaRecorder quando o global nao existe, sem alterar navegadores suportados.
Nao altera endpoint, payload, banco, schema, OAuth, Google Calendar, storage, OpenAI, env, token, Vercel, Supabase admin, Preview, homologacao ou producao.
